title: kaleidoscope_sculk
description: The affiliated mod of Kaleidoscope Cookery
body:
# Kaleidoscope: Sculk

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/kaleidoscope-sculk)](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaleidoscope-sculk)
[![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/kaleidoscope-sculk)](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaleidoscope-sculk)

**Deep Dark's delicious secrets await you.**

---

## 📖 About

Kaleidoscope: Sculk is an expansion for [Kaleidoscope: Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaleidoscope-kitchen) that brings the Deep Dark into your kitchen. Hunt Wardens, gather rare ingredients, and cook dishes with unique effects.

---

## 🍽️ Features

### New Items
- **Warden Tendril** - Drop from Wardens
- **Ancient Bone Fragment** - Drops when damaging Wardens
- **Sculk Fungus** - Obtain from Sculk blocks with kitchen knives
- **Sheer Purity** - A mysterious fruit from sculk environments
- **Soul** - Rare drop from Soul Fire

### New Crops
- **Echo Crop** - Two-stage crop that only grows on Sculk Catalysts

### New Tools
- **Erosion Knife** - Turns animal drops into Eerie Meat
- **Silent Knife** - Upgraded knife that grants Sonic Wave after 20 full-charge hits

### New Blocks
- **Deepslate Stove** - A new cooking stove
- **Placeable Food Blocks** - Shareable dishes for multiplayer

---

## ✨ New Effects

| Effect | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Sonic Wave** | Press R to shoot a sonic boom (higher level = more damage) |
| **Echo** | Wardens cannot detect your vibrations |
| **Abyss** | Deal more damage the deeper you go |
| **Sculk Dash** | Increased speed in sculk biomes |

---

## 🍲 Crafting (Examples)

- **Cooked Warden Tendril Bowl** → Sonic Wave
- **Boiled Sheer Purity** → Echo
- **Pork Ancient Bone Soup** → Vigor + Sonic Wave
- **Soul Pancake** → Resistance + Regeneration
- **Sculk Lamb Chop** → Sculk Dash

---
> **📢 Note:** This mod is still a work in progress. Due to certain circumstances, it is being released early. More content will be added in future updates. Your feedback and suggestions are always welcome!
